title: Campaign Launch
description: Full end-to-end campaign: define, research, strategize, write, create tasks in Notion, and publish. Exercises DuckDuckGo, Notion, and Buffer.

nodes.title: Campaign Brief
nodes.prompt: Ask the user for the campaign details. Suggest: (A) Product launch campaign, (B) Seasonal promotion, (C) Content series (e.g. 5-part LinkedIn series), (D) Custom campaign. Also ask: target audience, key message, timeline.

nodes.title: Campaign Research
nodes.prompt: Research the campaign topic. Find: audience conversations, competitor campaigns, trending angles, relevant data points.

nodes.title: Campaign Strategy
nodes.prompt: Create the campaign strategy: reader, pain, belief, point, proof, meaning for the campaign. Pick templates per platform. Define campaign narrative arc across all posts.

nodes.title: Approve Strategy
nodes.prompt: Show the campaign strategy brief. Ask: (A) Approve and proceed to writing and task creation, (B) Edit strategy, (C) Reject and restart.

nodes.title: Write Assets
nodes.prompt: Write all campaign assets: posts for each platform in the campaign, using the strategy brief and picked templates. Apply voice match and full frontmatter.

nodes.title: Create Campaign Tasks
nodes.prompt: Create tasks in the Campaign database in Notion. Include: campaign name, assets to produce, deadlines, and status tracking.

nodes.title: Final Approval
nodes.prompt: Show the user: (1) All campaign drafts, (2) Notion tasks created. Ask: (A) Publish all assets now, (B) Schedule across the campaign timeline, (C) Publish some now, hold others, (D) Hold all for manual review.

nodes.title: Publish Campaign
nodes.prompt: Build publish packages for approved campaign assets and dispatch.
